content:
卡斯托尔策划了第二次出逃，带着弟弟波吕克斯逃离提灯教会！

📍 **完成下列关键任务，并为卡斯托尔找出逃生路线：**
1、进入寝殿，喂波吕克斯吃下昏睡药丸
2、带波吕克斯前往“地下货仓”，并将他藏入货箱待天亮后运出
3、成功抵达“山洞”逃出提灯教会
4、注意：
✦ 抵达货仓前 可能会遇到灯卫盘问，利用圣子身份威慑他们以便继续前进；
✦ 离开货仓后 灯卫将阻拦卡斯托尔前进，请尽量避开！若提前拾得武器，可杀死他们继续前进。

🎁 守密人能找到几种逃跑路线？
在评论区分享逃生图，找齐所有路线后将在明天解锁全服奖励：**内含无垢之芯×20、特批药剂×10 **

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Castor plotted the second escape, fleeing the Church of the Lightbearers with his brother Pollux!

📍 **Complete the following tasks and find an escape route for Castor:**
1. Enter the bedchamber and feed Pollux the sleeping pill.
2. Take the sedated Pollux to the "Cellar", hide him in a cargo box to be shipped out at dawn.
3. Successfully reach the "Cave Entrance" to escape the Church of the Lightbearers.
4. Notes:
✦ If the Light Guards question Castor before he reaches the "Cellar", intimidate them with the very name of the Divus to proceed.
✦ Light Guards will be hostile after Castor leaves the "Cellar", so avoid them if possible! Weapons collected beforehand can be used to kill them and proceed.

🎁How many escape routes can you find? 
Share your escape maps in the comments! Once all routes are found, a server-wide reward will be unlocked tomorrow: **Pure Core×20, Special Potion Supply×10.**
thread_title: 🐦 奔逃的双生鸟：逃出提灯教会！Running Fledglings: Escape the Cave!
